textByHash.0352d70efb2866be78f97ed293ad2e296620df58: Well what sort of Fremennik are you if you don't travel! Besides, we heard this was the land to visit for breaking skulls and spilling blood!
textByHash.2bfe6467a8ffd7cb67eb44b5e82b6a48601eadb3: We put the things we'd taken somewhere safe, so we could get them back when we made peace again.
textByHash.35c929d1b10640b17e33a2ef9ab8beff9aafcb5f: Everything was going well, until we got back to that place, and a giant sea snake had moved in!
textByHash.675412551011d4c5fb964cd669cfed069f860e89: That idiot Armod should never have burned his diary!
textByHash.96d3a8aa4c0de8c73d5be7024741448aac90b063: You're almost smart enough to make a good rock.
textByHash.ab5165774e1cbed434b7d837c507fc1ffc09b9ab: I can't help it, I just have a weak stomach.
textByHash.c15987df888353634df5c0957128fa1145d4b721: You're no better, Hild. You said you knew where we were, and now look at us!
textByHash.c2a86625cbff81edda8ef5e5c55243df4ebdea8b: It's made a nest out of all the boxes and barrels.
textByHash.d32ee91cf1617b10ce933f51a4eb83c7a8fc1d91: Besides, it's not like he'll even look at the rubbish you've written in your diary.
textByHash.d351669d723e2a46b699830bc5ed6ac9ce2138f3: Nice impression of a rock you did there, Armod.
textByHash.dab97f886ca8132570ef95b6c4e49ebfd0570a95: Ha! As if you didn't know! We've heard about your exploits in the Colosseum! Maybe you'll see us next time you're there!
textByHash.e9ea47703fe45aa14725e529e08846b3b6b7848f: Of course! Have you not visited the Colosseum? You won't regret it if you do.
textByHash.ea104427af2e91e666272306873a0e0a422d9cd9: We're cold, we're hungry and now we're LOST!
textByHash.fbc3a9144eba7bed3fdc9a1e6d77ff3356dd40d4: It would have worked, if it hadn't been for that huge snake!
